_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of cyber operations support or enabling processes.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of MLOps principles and practices, including CI/CD for ML, automated retraining pipelines, model versioning, A/B testing infrastructure, and canary deployment patterns.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-017 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-007 (OP, cosine: 0.500), AG-K-006 (AG, cosine: 0.493).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.503). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, enabling, operations, processes, support] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, b, canary, cd, ci, deployment] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.882, R=0.830). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (96.2%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of cyber operations support or enabling processes." and "Knowledge of MLOps principles and practices, including CI/CD for ML, automated r". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 ≈ STS 0.503 (gap 0.011). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [cyber, enabling, operations, processes, support]. WIDAI-only: [automated, b, canary, cd, ci, deployment].
